title: Supplementary Materials PDF: Compile All Extended Results into LaTeX Appendices
summary: Demo notebook for the Supplementary Materials PDF evaluation pipeline. Loads 9 data sources (arithmetic, graph coloring, syllogistic, classifier experiments + ablation, routing, transfer, sensitivity, prospective evaluations) from a curated mini JSON dataset. Builds all 8 appendices (A-H) with printed tables showing CSD profiles, ablation matrices, routing simulations, cross-task transfer, syllogistic analysis, sample-size sensitivity, negative controls, and temperature configuration. Generates a 4-panel matplotlib visualization: CSD embedding variance profiles, feature ablation bar chart, F1 vs sample-size sensitivity curve, and appendix completion status. Computes completeness metrics mirroring the original eval_out.json output.
